Who region won in 2020 and which president
Nana Akufo Addo (NPP) won with 6,776,066 votes [Ghana_Election_Result.csv, computed].

who won in Ashanti Region in 2020
Nana Akufo Addo (NPP) won in Ashanti Region (no change) in 2020 [Ghana_Election_Result.csv, computed].
